notes: Sample staged Kee-Suri global output fixture (example.com sources only; not live fetched data).

key_implications: Enterprise AI procurement may favor latency-optimized stacks.
Platform policy shifts can compress indie AI app margins.

one_line_checkpoint.body: 글로벌 AI·반도체·플랫폼 신호가 enterprise money/work 결정에 동시에 작용하는지 확인하세요.
